generated: 2026-06-26 — rebuilt after a staff-offset bug was caught. The earlier single-note crops sometimes landed on OLIN (Bass) instead of OLIVER (Baritone), so the per-note 'reads low' findings were unreliable. Now each card shows OUR full engraving line vs the printed system with all voices LABELED — compare our engraving to the OLIVER staff.
howto: For each card: OUR ENGRAVING is the Baritone line we generated. THE PAGE shows the printed system — your line is OLIVER (the middle staff, labeled). Trace left to right; the note to scrutinize is the one we RECONSTRUCTED (Audiveris had dropped it). Mark Correct or Wrong + the right pitch.
lockState: ENGRAVING-LOCK RED — these 5 reconstructed bars need your sign-off.
